title: Majulah Package – MediSave Bonus
text:
Majulah Package – MediSave Bonus - SupportGoWhere
Majulah Package – MediSave Bonus
Share link
Supplements medical savings of seniors through one-off CPF bonus.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Eligible seniors can receive one-off CPF bonus of up to $2,000
No application needed
Collapse all sections
About this support

One-off CPF bonus of up to $2,000, tiered by age, Annual Value of residence, and number of properties owned.

Who is this for?

Born in 1973 or earlier

Singapore Citizen

How to apply?

No application required.

Where can I find help?

View more details

1800 222 2888

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 01 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
